$comment: NON-NORMATIVE. This vocabulary is a conformance-suite diagnostic aid, not part of the CDX specification. The specification mandates DISPOSITIONS (State Machine section 5.4) and OUTCOMES (Provenance and Lineage section 3.3) — never error identifiers. A conforming implementation is free to use its own internal errors and map them to these codes in its conformance adapter; it is never required to adopt this vocabulary. A code is therefore a diagnostic that sharpens a failure report, and is never the pass criterion for a MUST.

CDX-E-ID-PENDING.summary: A manifest projection was requested for a document whose id is still `pending`.
CDX-E-ID-PENDING.note: The projection is defined only once the document id is fixed.

CDX-E-HASH-MALFORMED.summary: A declared content hash is not a well-formed `algorithm:hexdigest`.

CDX-E-PATH-TRAVERSAL.summary: A declared path is not a safe archive-relative path (escapes the archive root).
CDX-E-PATH-TRAVERSAL.clause: Security Extension section 9.7; Container Format section 9.1

CDX-E-STATE-UNKNOWN.clause: State Machine section 3.1; Security Extension section 9.7

CDX-E-EXTENSION-DUPLICATE.summary: Two `manifest.extensions[]` entries share an id, making the projection ambiguous.

CDX-E-PRESENTATION-TYPE-UNKNOWN.summary: A `manifest.presentation[]` entry declares a type outside the enum.

CDX-E-REFERENCE-HASH-CONFLICT.summary: The same declared path appears twice with conflicting hashes.
CDX-E-REFERENCE-HASH-CONFLICT.note: Applies to both the config-file references and the asset-index references.

CDX-E-REQUIRED-SIGNER-SET-EMPTY.note: Forbidden so an absent policy and an empty policy are not both expressible.

CDX-E-REQUIRED-SIGNER-DUPLICATE.summary: Two `requiredSigners` entries declare the same identity.

CDX-E-REQUIRED-SIGNER-KIND-AMBIGUOUS.summary: A `requiredSigners` entry carries zero, or more than one, identity kind.

CDX-E-REQUIRED-SIGNER-ID-MALFORMED.summary: A `requiredSigners` identity value is malformed for its declared kind.

CDX-E-LINEAGE-CYCLE.summary: The lineage walk revisited a document already on the current path.

CDX-E-LINEAGE-ANCESTORS-CONTRADICT.summary: A declared `ancestors` entry contradicts the resolved parent chain (forged tail).

CDX-E-LINEAGE-ROOT-WITH-ANCESTORS.summary: A document declaring no parent also declares a non-empty ancestors chain.

CDX-E-LINEAGE-UNRESOLVABLE.summary: A link in the chain could not be resolved, so the chain cannot be fully walked.
CDX-E-LINEAGE-UNRESOLVABLE.note: Unverified, never endorsed — and never grounds to reject the document.

CDX-E-LINEAGE-BOUND-REACHED.summary: The traversal depth or breadth bound was reached before the walk completed.
CDX-E-LINEAGE-BOUND-REACHED.note: A legitimately deep or wide history is not an inconsistency.
